entries.notes: 4/4 checks green: control files, dashboard, node project, git collector. (Commit later rewritten to 724aa02 via filter-branch during GitHub setup; same content.)
45/45 Vitest tests green. MCP integration suite (InMemoryTransport Client ⇄ Server) exercises every tool. T-M-001 five-tool surface enforced.

4/4 checks green: examples/two_agents_collaborate.ts exit 0; alice published a 64-hex belief id; bob independently verified alice's signature; scripted answer 'traffic in cambridge is congested (+14 min)' produced verbatim.

4/4 checks green: adversarial demo exit 0; default recall=1 (honest only); audit recall (min_trust=-1) = 2 (both); charlie's answer is the honest reading. Mallet's claim is filtered by the trust gate as specified.
3/3 checks green: gauntlet_rewind demo exit 0; live recall == 0 post-forget; as_of=pre-forget recall == 1. Bi-temporal state preserved.

Both matrix jobs green: gates-ubuntu-latest-node22 (22s), gates-macos-latest-node22 (37s). tsc strict + gates 1-5 all pass on fresh runners. ops/data/*.json uploaded as artefacts. Node 22 LTS; FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24 applied.

Stock Claude Opus 4.7 agent (adaptive thinking + effort:xhigh) completed the scripted task using only docs/README.md. Dot→underscore tool-name bridge working. Final text contained 'congested' and '14' as required. Job duration: 27s. Completion marker logged verbatim.
